original: A brassiere made from the down of the slepra hawks on Griston VI. The plush interior is designed to keep chests of all sizes warm and comfortable during travels. The outside is plentifully bestrewn with full, white feathers, providing a provocative display for use in the bedroom.
context: <<POS:05725324>> e.tooltip='A brassiere made from the down of the slepra hawks on Gristo'
